trigger_keywords: tipo de copa se recomienda para vinos tintos de cuerpo completo y gran complejidad aromática
tipo de copas son más adecuadas para servir vinos tintos de cuerpo completo
copas grandes con forma de balón
large bowl red wine aroma expression

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A full-bodied, aromatically complex red wine is served in a glass with a large bowl.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The broad surface area increases contact with air and the bowl provides headspace in which volatile aroma compounds can accumulate.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine's complex aromas can open and be perceived more clearly than in a very small or narrow glass.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: A large bowl provides surface area and headspace that support aroma release and perception.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
